results.title: Xero Developer
results.description: Xero Developer provides documentation and resources for integrating with Xero's accounting software via its API.

results.title: Xera
results.description: Xera is a hosting account and support management system designed to work with MOFH, offering features like user and theme management, administrative access, and integration with various services.

results.title: Xero Node SDK
results.description: The Xero Node SDK simplifies access to Xero's APIs for JavaScript developers, enabling the creation of applications that utilize small business and general ledger accounting data.

results.title: Xero Python SDK
results.description: The Xero Python SDK simplifies access to Xero's APIs, enabling developers to build applications using small business accounting data.

results.title: Xero OpenAPI
results.description: An OpenAPI (Swagger) specification for the Xero API, including OAuth 2.0 security, for generating SDKs and integrating with Xero services.

results.title: Xero NetStandard
results.description: The Xero-NetStandard SDK simplifies accessing Xero's APIs in C# for building applications with small business and general ledger accounting data.

results.title: Xrepo
results.description: Xrepo is a cross-platform C/C++ package manager based on Xmake, supporting multi-version semantic selection, decentralized repositories, and integration with third-party package managers.

results.title: XO
results.description: XO is an opinionated yet configurable JavaScript/TypeScript linter (ESLint wrapper) that enforces strict and readable code with great defaults, eliminating the need to discuss code style in pull requests.

results.title: Xee
results.description: Xee is a Rust-based XML Execution Engine featuring an almost complete XPath 3.1 implementation and a command-line tool for XML manipulation.

results.title: Rovo
results.description: Rovo is a lightweight macro-based framework for automatically generating OpenAPI documentation from doc comments in Axum handlers.

results.title: GNU xorriso
results.description: GNU xorriso is a program that copies files into ISO 9660 filesystems and allows session-wise manipulation, burning to optical media, and restoring files without requiring external formatter or burn programs.

results.title: Xero Node OAuth2 App
results.description: This Node.js project demonstrates how to use the Xero Node SDK for JavaScript developers to build applications with Xero Accounting platform data, utilizing OAuth 2.0 for secure authentication and access tokens.

results.title: XIRR and XNPV
results.description: A tool or library for calculating the eXtended Internal Rate of Return (XIRR) and eXtended Net Present Value (XNPV) for cash flows with irregular dates.

results.title: Xior
results.description: A lightweight HTTP request library based on fetch with plugin support and an API similar to axios.

results.title: Kiro Docs
results.description: Kiro is a modern, opinionated framework for building web applications. It focuses on developer experience and performance, offering a streamlined way to create dynamic and interactive user interfaces.

results.title: Shiro
results.description: Shiro is an SDK for building bots with Java/Kotlin and SpringBoot, offering websocket integration, message event handling, and a flexible plugin system compatible with standards like Onebot V11.

results.title: Kryo
results.description: Kryo is a fast and efficient binary object graph serialization framework for Java, designed for high speed, low size, and an easy-to-use API for persisting and copying objects.

results.title: Tyro
results.description: Tyro is a tool for generating CLI interfaces from type-annotated Python code, supporting functions, dataclasses, and more for easy configuration.

results.title: Lexio
results.description: Lexio is a React library for building Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) interfaces, offering customizable components and hooks for handling complex workflows, document types, and streaming responses.

results.title: Rooroo
results.description: Rooroo is a minimalist AI orchestration framework for VS Code that streamlines software development using a team of specialized agents led by a Navigator.

results.title: Furo
results.description: Furo is a clean and customizable Sphinx documentation theme designed for minimal scaffolding, responsiveness, and ease of navigation.

results.title: Xee
results.description: Xee is an Xarray extension that provides seamless integration with Google Earth Engine, enabling users to open and manipulate Earth Engine ImageCollections and Images as Xarray Datasets.

results.title: Exo
results.description: Run your own AI cluster at home with everyday devices 📱💻 🖥️⌚

results.title: Clio
results.description: Clio is an XRP Ledger API server optimized for RPC calls, storing validated historical ledger and transaction data efficiently, and supporting scalable read throughput with Cassandra or ScyllaDB for high availability.

results.title: Xorq
results.description: Xorq is a framework for cataloging, sharing, and shipping multi-engine compute as diffable artifacts for data in flight, enabling declarative and reusable ML pipelines across Python and SQL engines.

results.title: Cheerio
results.description: The fast, flexible, and elegant library for parsing and manipulating HTML and XML.

results.title: Hex
results.description: A Rust crate for encoding and decoding data into/from hexadecimal representation, with support for `no_std` environments and `serde` serialization.

results.title: Mito
results.description: Mito is a set of Jupyter extensions that automates repetitive Excel reports and accelerates Python coding through an interactive spreadsheet interface, AI-powered tools, and integrations for Streamlit and Dash.

results.title: XLSX
results.description: Go library for reading and writing XLSX files.

results.title: XRPL-GO
results.description: XRPL-GO is a Go library that provides a comprehensive implementation for interacting with the XRP Ledger, offering features for serialization, transaction signing, and models for core API objects.
